description_long: This is a large, rectangular wooden storage box with a hinged lid, painted in a weathered military green color with visible patches of wear and distress. The box features horizontal wooden planks and has white stenciled text on its front and side panels, suggesting it was used for military or industrial storage, possibly for grenades or ammunition. The interior is spacious and unlined, showing the raw wood surface. The lid is attached with visible hinges and opens upwards, revealing the full depth of the box. There are no visible handles or locking mechanisms, and the box sits directly on the ground. The overall appearance is rugged and utilitarian, suitable for outdoor or garage environments.
description: A large, weathered green wooden storage box with a hinged lid and stenciled white text, designed for rugged, utilitarian use. The box has a distressed finish and no visible handles or locks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open lid, interior space, and stenciled white text on the front panel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the box, the open lid, and additional stenciled text on the side.
description_view_2: Top-down view focusing on the open lid and the flat, plank construction of the box's top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the box's length, open lid, and distressed paint with no visible text.
